visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit room, looking intently off-camera with a serious and focused expression. In the dark background, another person in a suit is partially visible. White Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed in the upper left corner of the frame. The audio begins with a man speaking in a firm, commanding tone, as if giving an order, "454870." Another man immediately repeats the number, "454870," in a quick, focused voice, confirming he has received the instruction. The first man then responds with a simple, satisfied, "Okay." The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a hand adjusting a knob on a black walkie-talkie. The device's small digital screen is illuminated, displaying the numbers "454.835" and some smaller text below. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. Following this exchange, the distinct, rhythmic clicking of a dial being turned on a walkie-talkie can be heard, suggesting the number was just set.
